creator: robi@nunnisoft.ch
text:
FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org ha scritto:
> Thank you very much for your problem report.
> It has the internal identification `ports/137478'.
> The individual assigned to look at your
> report is: freebsd-ports-bugs. 
> 
> You can access the state of your problem report at any time
> via this link:
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=137478
> 
>> Category:       ports
>> Responsible:    freebsd-ports-bugs
>> Synopsis:       [PATCH] www/joomla15: update to 1.5.14
>> Arrival-Date:   Thu Aug 06 09:20:05 UTC 2009

Hi.

I just noticed that this:
http://portaudit.freebsd.org/739b94a4-838b-11de-938e-003048590f9e.html
reports that the bug affects joomla15 < 1.5.15

That's wrong.

it affects joomla15 < 1.5.14

see:
http://developer.joomla.org/security/news/303-20090723-core-com-mailto-timeout-issue.html

This error causes portupgrade with portaudit db updated and in place to 
fail the upgrade.

Thank you.
Robi
